headline: Jobs data live updates: Layoffs tick up amid high-profile job cuts at Coinbase, Meta, and other workplaces
summary: The narrative about the state of the labor market — whether it remains in stasis or is beginning to heat up — will be shaped this week by a series of data drops.

headline: ADP Announces Pricing of its Senior Notes Due 2036
summary: Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (Nasdaq: ADP), a global leader in HR and payroll solutions, today announced the pricing of a public offering of $1.0 billion aggregate principal amount of its 5.000% senior notes due 2036.
